rationale: Real (non-fictitious) name of the domestic LP. entity.name per the entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction convention since this is a Maine-record amendment filing.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The assumed name of the limited partnership affected by this change
rationale: The specific assumed/fictitious name being modified by this filing. New schema-gap key — the existing filing.terminated_fictitious_name (MLPA-5A) is termination-specific; this is a MODIFICATION of an active assumed-name registration, so a stable identifier key (assumed_name.name) is appropriate.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The location where the assumed name is currently being used, if any
rationale: Current location associated with the assumed name (the 'as-is' state that the THIRD section will modify).
Boolean elect-in for the 'change' action. One or more of Check Box4/5/6 may be selected — the form text 'The limited partnership intends to:' permits multiple simultaneous actions in a single filing.
Boolean elect-in for the 'add' action.
Boolean elect-in for the 'delete' action.

label_verbatim: THIRD: (provide description of change/addition/deletion in the space provide below) — line 1
rationale: First line of the change-description free text. Multi-line widget primitive same as amendment.changes_description.lineN on MLPA-13A — synth concatenates non-empty lines; either may be empty.
Second line of the change-description free text.

label_verbatim: Additional locations are attached as Exhibit ___, and made a part hereof
rationale: Boolean opt-in indicating additional locations are appended on an exhibit (when more locations don't fit in the 2-line inline area).
Inline single-letter exhibit reference (small ~17pt-wide widget consistent with letter blank).
Signing date. Top-right of page 1 above the GENERAL PARTNER(S) block.

Printed name of the individual GP signer — Shape B per filing-signer-shape convention (single-widget name-only, capacity implied by '*Statement MUST be signed by at least one general partner' footnote citing 31 MRSA §1324.1.J). Reviewer corrected drafter's general_partner_1.printed_name mapping per MLPA-5A precedent: this form has only ONE inline individual slot and ONE inline entity slot — single-slot post-formation modification matches MLPA-5A which uses filing.signer.* / filing.signer_entity.*. The role-keyed pattern (general_partner_N.*) is reserved for formation-style filings like MLPA-6 where the LP is being created.

label_verbatim: For General Partner(s) which are Entities — Name of Entity
rationale: Name of an entity general partner when the signer is itself a corporation/LLC/LP rather than an individual. Single-slot — same key family as MLPA-5A's filing.signer_entity.name.

label_verbatim: For General Partner(s) which are Entities — By ___ (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of the entity GP. Same Shape-D primitive scoped under filing.signer_entity.* — matches MLPA-5A.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [2]
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees ($35 base per page-0 'Filing Fee $35.00' header plus expedite premium).
Filing-contact name.
Filing-contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
